sentences.target: Ma brosse à dents électrique est déchargée.
sentences.reading: /ma bʁɔs a dɑ̃ e.lɛk.tʁik ɛ deʃaʁʒe/

translations.fr: Ma brosse à dents électrique est déchargée.
translations.ipa: /ma bʁɔs a dɑ̃ e.lɛk.tʁik ɛ deʃaʁʒe/
translations.es: Mi cepillo de dientes eléctrico está sin batería.
translations.it: Il mio spazzolino elettrico è scarico.
translations.ru: У моей электрической зубной щётки села батарея.
translations.pt: Minha escova de dentes elétrica está sem bateria.
translations.he: למברשת השיניים החשמלית שלי נגמרה הסוללה.
translations.vi: Bàn chải đánh răng điện của tôi hết pin rồi.
translations.uk: У моєї електричної зубної щітки сіла батарея.
translations.hi: मेरे इलेक्ट्रिक टूथब्रश की बैटरी खत्म हो गई है.
translations.pl: Moja elektryczna szczoteczka do zębów jest rozładowana.
translations.nb: Den elektriske tannbørsten min er tom for batteri.
translations.id: Sikat gigi elektrik saya kehabisan baterai.
translations.ro: Periuța mea de dinți electrică este descărcată.
translations.cs: Můj elektrický zubní kartáček je vybitý.
translations.da: Min elektriske tandbørste er løbet tør for strøm.
translations.ja: 電動歯ブラシの充電が切れた。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifies the head noun 'brosse' (subject NP).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase 'Ma brosse à dents électrique'.
Preposition linking the complement 'dents' to 'brosse' in the fixed compound 'brosse à dents'.
Common noun, plural; complement of 'brosse' via the preposition 'à' within the compound noun.
Attributive adjective modifying the compound noun phrase 'brosse à dents'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Past participle used adjectivally, feminine singular agreeing with 'brosse'; predicate of the copular construction.

sentences.target: On prend la voiture électrique pour aller travailler.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ la vwa.tyʁ e.lɛk.tʁik puʁ a.le tʁa.va.je/

translations.fr: On prend la voiture électrique pour aller travailler.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ la vwa.tyʁ e.lɛk.tʁik puʁ a.le tʁa.va.je/
translations.en: We’re taking the electric car to work.
translations.es: Vamos al trabajo en el coche eléctrico.
translations.de: Wir fahren mit dem Elektroauto zur Arbeit.
translations.it: Andiamo al lavoro con l'auto elettrica.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们开电动汽车去上班。
translations.ru: Мы едем на работу на электромобиле.
translations.pt: Vamos de carro elétrico para o trabalho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi làm bằng ô tô điện.
translations.ar: نحن ذاهبون إلى العمل بالسيارة الكهربائية.
translations.nl: We gaan met de elektrische auto naar het werk.
translations.uk: Ми їдемо на роботу на електромобілі.
translations.hi: हम इलेक्ट्रिक कार से काम पर जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πηγαίνουμε στη δουλειά με το ηλεκτρικό αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Vi kjører til jobb med elbilen.
translations.id: Kami berangkat kerja naik mobil listrik.
translations.sv: Vi åker till jobbet med elbilen.
translations.ro: Mergem la serviciu cu mașina electrică.
translations.da: Vi kører på arbejde i elbilen.
translations.ja: 電気自動車で仕事に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'prend'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; selects a direct object ('la voiture électrique').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'voiture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'prend'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'voiture'; agrees in gender/number with the noun.
Preposition introducing a purpose infinitive clause ('pour aller travailler').
Infinitive verb following 'pour'; forms an infinitival purpose construction and takes another infinitive ('travailler').
Infinitive verb complement to 'aller' within the purpose phrase; denotes the intended action.

sentences.target: Tu as branché la guitare électrique.

translations.fr: Tu as branché la guitare électrique.
translations.en: You plugged in the electric guitar.
translations.vi: Bạn đã cắm đàn guitar điện rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt de elektrische gitaar aangesloten.
translations.ja: エレキギターをつないだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary 'avoir', present indicative 2nd person singular; forms the passé composé with the participle 'branché'.
Past participle (VerbForm=Part) of the main lexical verb; part of the compound tense with 'as', taking 'la guitare électrique' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'guitare'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'branché'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'guitare'; agrees with the noun.

sentences.target: Ces trottinettes électriques bloquent le trottoir.

translations.fr: Ces trottinettes électriques bloquent le trottoir.
translations.en: These electric scooters are blocking the sidewalk.
translations.es: Estos patinetes eléctricos bloquean la acera.
translations.it: Questi monopattini elettrici bloccano il marciapiede.
translations.zh-Hans: 这些电动滑板车挡住了人行道。
translations.yue: 呢啲電動滑板車阻住條行人路。
translations.pt: Esses patinetes elétricos estão bloqueando a calçada.
translations.he: הקורקינטים החשמליים האלה חוסמים את המדרכה.
translations.vi: Những chiếc xe scooter điện này đang chắn vỉa hè.
translations.nl: Deze elektrische steps blokkeren het trottoir.
translations.hu: Ezek az elektromos rollerek elállják a járdát.
translations.hi: ये इलेक्ट्रिक स्कूटर फुटपाथ को रोक रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αυτά τα ηλεκτρικά πατίνια μπλοκάρουν το πεζοδρόμιο.
translations.ja: これらの電動キックボードが歩道をふさいでいる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, plural; deictic determiner of 'trottinettes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective, plural; agrees with 'trottinettes' and modifies the subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; predicate of the sentence, takes 'le trottoir' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'trottoir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'bloquent'.
